subject: Kingship Christian Centre
value: Kingship Christian Centre uses a 1 January to 31 December operational and financial year.

source.conversation_topic: Kingship administration databases and annual operating cycle
Correction and confirmation of the Kingship roadmap

subject: Kingship Finance Database — 2026
value: The 2026 Finance Database is complete and covers income, expenses, donations, budgets, banking, reporting, controls and compliance notices.

subject: Kingship Members Database — 2026
value: The 2026 Members Database is complete and covers members, households, visitors, new converts, attendance, baptisms, follow-ups, pastoral-care summaries, cell groups, ministry involvement, consent and data retention.

subject: Kingship Volunteer Database — 2026
value: The 2026 Volunteer Database is complete and covers volunteer profiles, skills, availability, teams, assignments, screening, safeguarding, training, attendance, service hours, onboarding, incidents, recognition, reimbursements and consent.

subject: Kingship Events Database — 2026
value: The 2026 Events Database is complete and covers event planning, recurring series, registrations, attendance, teams, tasks, programmes, venues, vendors, budgets, logistics, marketing, risk, reviews and publishing.

subject: Kingship Worship Database — 2026
value: The 2026 Worship Database is complete and covers audition review, assessments, team membership, roles, availability, rehearsals, repertoire, setlists, performances, recording projects, licensing, equipment, development, conduct and media consent.

subject: Thrive In Two Database — 2026
value: The 2026 Thrive In Two Database is complete and covers enquiries, three contact-advisor positions, clients, appointments, minimal session records, care plans, referrals, follow-ups, courses, consent, risk, resources, outcomes and payments.

subject: Kingship Outreach Database — 2026
value: The 2026 Outreach Database is complete and covers beneficiaries, requests, needs assessments, referrals, campaigns, activities, food distributions, inventory, stock, in-kind donations, partners, teams, schools, hospitals, evangelism, logistics, safeguarding, consent, expenses and impact.

subject: Kingship Media Database — 2026
value: The 2026 Media Database is complete and covers content requests, calendar, campaigns, sermons, livestreams, social posts, design, photo and video production, media assets, publishing, approvals, assignments, equipment, brand assets, rights, analytics, website updates, incidents and archives.

subject: Kingship administration databases
value: General operational workbooks must contain only necessary administrative data and minimal summaries. Detailed counselling, prayer, safeguarding, beneficiary, medical, disciplinary and intimate case information belongs in separately restricted records; public reporting must be de-identified.

source.conversation_topic: Privacy controls across Kingship administration databases

subject: Kingship Christian Centre
value: Kingship Christian Centre does not currently have written Section 18A approval and must not issue tax-deductible donation receipts unless approval is received.

subject: Kingship website forms
value: Open Hands assistance or volunteer form

source.conversation_topic: Planning all Kingship website forms ahead of automation

subject: Kingship website forms
value: Public website forms must write to an intake, import-staging or restricted-intake register for review and validation before records are transferred into operational master tables.

source.conversation_topic: Kingship Phase 3 form and automation architecture

subject: Kingship Worship audition system
value: The existing Kingship Worship audition Apps Script and embedded HTML form are the working reference implementation. It records applications in a dedicated audition register, generates KWA references, accepts uploaded or external videos, stores uploads in private Drive, validates required fields and tracks upload errors.

source.conversation_topic: Review of the uploaded audition Apps Script and embedded form

subject: Kingship Worship applicants
value: Review and callback or trial process
Accepted applicant receives an approved Volunteer Database assignment
Accepted and approved person becomes an active Worship Database team member

subject: Kingship Christian Centre
value: Phase 3A — System Audit and Integration Map
Phase 3H — Reports and Leadership Dashboard Feed

source.conversation_topic: Official roadmap summary after Phase 2 completion

value.mandla: Sole full administrative access to underlying operational systems.
value.jasper: Read-only leadership access to approved aggregate dashboards.
value.future: Role-based accounts may be added later.

subject: Kingship Admin Portal
value: Use admin.kingshipcentre.co.za as a subdomain of the existing kingshipcentre.co.za domain; no additional domain purchase is required.

source.conversation_topic: Correction of roadmap drift after Batch 3H

subject: Kingship Christian Centre
value: Use intentional minimalism: black, white and gold; bold condensed typography; clean structured layouts; restrained brush accents; controlled imagery; no unnecessary text, random icons, filler elements or visual clutter.

source.conversation_topic: Kingship media database and brand direction
